replacements.Configure Gmail watch + Pub/Sub + OpenCl: 配置 Gmail watch + Pub/Sub + OpenClaw hooks
replacements.Gmail account to watch: 要监听的 Gmail 账号

replacements.Gmail label to watch: 要监听的 Gmail 标签
replacements.Push token for gog watch serve: gog watch serve 的 push token
replacements.gog watch serve bind host: gog watch serve 绑定主机

replacements.Renew watch every N minutes: 每 N 分钟续期 watch

replacements.Run gog watch serve + auto-renew loop: 运行 gog watch serve + 自动续期循环
